== Notes for [[Item:Q57596|Q57596]] ==

Lawyer of the Real Audiencia of Mexico and encomendero in 1570

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/368088

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/12692260

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/75376

http://pares.mcu.es/ParesBusquedas20/catalogo/description/7283693

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
